name: Voges Services Inc
districts_or_customers: Likely small rural Randolph County, IL school districts around Coulterville; specific district contracts not publicly disclosed
recent_news: No M&A or news of note; long-running single-owner operator since 1984 per directory listings
fit_notes: Very small (~15 employees, <$500K rev) single-owner rural IL operator with founder (Morris Voges) likely at/near retirement age (operating since 1984) — classic succession-driven tuck-in candidate, though scale is at the floor of what's worth a platform call.

name: Evans Group Action Bus Coach
districts_or_customers: No public school district contracts found; name suggests charter/motorcoach orientation; Byron Center Public Schools transportation is district-operated (not contracted) per district website
recent_news: No web presence or news found; no FMCSA SAFER record located under this exact name
fit_notes: Cannot confirm this is an active school-bus contractor — appears to be a small charter/coach operation registered to a residential address in Byron Center. Byron Center and Byron Area Schools run district-owned transportation, so no contract base. Low fit for Summit tuck-in absent confirmation it operates yellow buses under district contracts.

name: Allstar Transportation LLC
owner_or_parent: All-Star Transportation LLC (Dufour family) — independent platform, NOT a tuck-in target
districts_or_customers: 35 CT towns/cities across Litchfield, New Haven, and upper Fairfield counties; ~47,000 students/day; 18 terminals incl. Plymouth Terminal at 16 School St, Pequabuck CT 06781 (likely the address in the source record, mis-coded as Poquonock/06064)
recent_news: Acquired Worhunsky Corp. of Plymouth, CT in 2014 (~120 vehicles, added Wolcott/Plymouth/Thomaston/Winchester). Teamsters Local 671 ratified first CBA at Waterbury yard in April 2025.
fit_notes: The source record's '16 School St / Poquonock' address almost certainly maps to All-Star Transportation's Plymouth Terminal (16 School St, Pequabuck CT 06781) — not an independent small operator. All-Star itself is a ~900-bus Dufour-family CT platform with its own acquisition program; it is a peer/competing consolidator, NOT a viable Summit tuck-in target. SKIP unless evidence emerges of a separate unrelated 'Allstar Transportation' entity at that address.

name: Connect Kids Ct Inc
owner_or_parent: Connect Kids CT Outreach Services (501(c)(3) nonprofit)
districts_or_customers: After-school program transport for at-risk/neglected Waterbury-area youth; not a school district yellow-bus contractor; Waterbury Public Schools uses Durham School Services and All-Star Transportation
recent_news: 501(c)(3) status recognized April 2021; affiliated outreach nonprofit at same 1906 N Main St / 150 E Aurora St addresses providing tutoring/mentoring
fit_notes: Not a traditional school-bus contractor — operates as a small nonprofit-affiliated youth/after-school transport service in Waterbury using vans. Waterbury district contracts are held by Durham and All-Star. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Southeastern Bus Co
